_comment: Template for both app.airbotix.ai and teacher.airbotix.ai. Replace ${PLACEHOLDERS} before passing to `aws cloudfront create-distribution`. ACCOUNT_ID + ACM_CERT_ARN come from one-time setup; OAC_ID + DIST_ID are returned from create-origin-access-control + create-distribution respectively (chicken-and-egg: create OAC first, then distribution, then update S3 bucket policy with the distribution ARN).

DefaultCacheBehavior._cachePolicyComment: CachingOptimized — managed CloudFront policy. For /index.html no-cache, attach the additional behavior below.

Items._cachePolicyComment: CachingDisabled managed policy — /index.html must update immediately on deploy

_priceClassComment: PriceClass_100 = US/Canada/Europe edge locations only. PriceClass_200 adds Asia-Pacific. For AU customers, prefer PriceClass_200 (~10% cost bump).
